## Summary

Describe the change and which Pre-Phase deliverable(s) this PR addresses.

## Checklist (Definition of Done)

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (coverage goals: rules >=80%, overall >=70%)
- [ ] Integration tests added where applicable
- [ ] PTIL JSON Schema validated
- [ ] Rule package version recorded where relevant
- [ ] Migration scripts reviewed and tested
- [ ] Security: no secrets in code; SAST scan passed
- [ ] Audit events/emitted for state changes (where applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (ADR, NFR, Data Model, DoD)
- [ ] Feature flagged if not fully stable

## Notes
Link any related ADRs, design docs, or issue numbers.
